name: Gmail MCP
description: Manages Gmail end-to-end via MCP — send, draft, reply, and search messages, organize with labels, retrieve contacts, and handle attachments.

skills.name: Email Management
skills.description: Fetches, searches, sends, drafts, and deletes Gmail messages using natural language or Gmail query syntax filters.

skills.name: Label Organization
skills.description: Creates, modifies, and applies Gmail labels to messages and threads for inbox organization and filtering.

skills.name: Contact Retrieval
skills.description: Looks up and retrieves Google Contacts to autofill email recipients and keep people data in sync with Gmail.
